description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on every push to main and on pull requests. The workflow uses a concurrency group to cancel in-progress jobs and runs multiple jobs with different configurations. The main job, run-tests, uses a matrix strategy to test on different operating systems and Python versions, checking out the repository, setting up the environment, installing dependencies, and running tests. Additional jobs test pre-commit hooks, minimum versions, prereleases, and source distribution.
